channel.title: Rust on sp
channel.description: Recent content in Rust on sp

item.title: Rust implmentation of K-Means
item.description:
I got an assignment for this week: write the K-Means algorithm, in any language you like.
So, first, we have to understand what it does and how it works.

What is K-Means?

k-means clustering is a method of vector quantization, originally from signal processing, that aims to partition n observations into k clusters in which each observation belongs to the cluster with the nearest mean (cluster centers or cluster centroid), serving as a prototype of the cluster. [1]
